name: Garlicky Baked Vegetables with Spoon Bread Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix melted butter, flour, Lemon-pepper seasoning, salt, and crushed rosemary.
3. Add peas, onion, garlic, potatoes, and tomatoes to the mixture. Stir until evenly coated.
4. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until vegetables are tender and lightly browned.
6. Remove from oven and serve hot.
